description: GIVEN I have connected the analog stick to the console

steps.action:
WHEN I Press the Left Thumbstick (1) button
AND I Press the Right Thumbstick (11) button

![](index.php?/attachments/get/14344232)
![](index.php?/attachments/get/14344233)
steps.result:
THEN I should notice that the Left Thumbstick (1) moves directionally and function as a clickable button

THEN I should notice that the Left Thumbstick (1) interacts with the MLB.TV app and Xbox console

THEN I should notice that the Right Thumbstick (11) moves directionally to the right and functions as a clickable button

THEN I should notice that the Right Thumbstick (11) interacts with the MLB.TV app and Xbox console
